tasks.title: Implement core features
tasks.description:
Build the main functionality

- [x] PWA support for photon apps
- [x] Manifest and icon generation
- [x] Offline handling with user message
- [x] iframe + postMessage architecture (MCP Apps pattern)
- [x] /api/invoke endpoint for HTTP method calls
- [x] Launch as App in settings menu
- [x] Right-click context menu on photons
- [x] Methods section header with photon name and settings

tasks.title: Test Kanban integration
tasks.description:
Verify all Kanban methods work correctly

- [x] getMyTasks - retrieves AI-assigned tasks
- [x] updateTask - updates task descriptions
- [x] moveTask - moves tasks between columns
- [x] addComment - adds comments to tasks
- [x] Stop hook enforcement - blocks on any In Progress task
